problem.title: Are you an agency owner or
problem.description1: If you spend your day answering leads, chasing your team, and trying to understand spreadsheets that never add up, you don't have a company, you have an exhausting job.
problem.description2: The problem isn't your team or your leads.
problem.description2Highlight: It's the lack of a process that works for you.

cost.title: What's stopping you from
cost.revenueLossText: 80% of sales are lost due to lack of follow-up. Without management, you're throwing money away every day.
cost.hoursWastedText: While you're manually generating contracts and quotes, your agency stops growing. The owner should be the strategist, not the typist.
cost.clientsLostText: Without knowing how much you'll earn next month, you can't invest, hire, or rest. That's amateurism.

hope.title: The freedom of having an agency
hope.description: Imagine waking up, opening the dashboard, and seeing exactly where every cent is, who your team is serving, and which contract is next to be signed.
hope.tagline: Strategic management isn't a luxury, it's survival.

faq.title: Questions from those who want to grow
faq.q1: Why is a card required for the trial?
faq.a1: Qualify isn't a 'toy', it's a serious management tool. The card ensures we're dealing with real agency owners seeking professional results. You have 14 days to cancel at no cost.
faq.q2: I already use spreadsheets, why change?
faq.a2: Spreadsheets are passive. Qualify is active. It warns you when a lead goes cold, generates your contracts, and gives you AI insights. Spreadsheets store data, Qualify generates profit.
faq.q3: How long does it take to see results?
faq.a3: Organization is immediate. In 48h you'll have a clear view of all your leads. The increase in conversion usually appears within the first 30 days of using the method.
faq.a4: Yes. It analyzes your leads' behavior and suggests the best approach, saving hours of 'thinking about what to write' and increasing your closing chances.
